title: China's Coal Output Sets Another Record; Hydropower Output Remains Low
section_path: China's Coal Output Sets Another Record; Hydropower Output Remains Low
section_path_text: China's Coal Output Sets Another Record; Hydropower Output Remains Low
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in a client note on Tuesday, China's coal production totaled a record 417.2 million tons last month. This has marked an increase of 50.1 million tons (14%) from February and is up year-on-year by 21.4 million tons (5%). As we have been stressing in our Weekly China Reports, the central government last year was no longer primarily focused on improving mine safety and instead shifted its focus to ensuring robust coal production.
